scripts.optimize:images: node -e "const sharp=require('sharp');const jobs=[{in:'src/assets/images/background-gradient.jpg',out:'src/assets/images/background-gradient.webp',w:1920,q:65},{in:'src/assets/images/veggies-bg.jpeg',out:'src/assets/images/veggies-bg.webp',w:1920,q:62},{in:'src/assets/images/veggie-box.jpg',out:'src/assets/images/veggie-box.webp',w:1280,q:72}];(async()=>{for(const j of jobs){const input=sharp(j.in);const meta=await input.metadata();const width=Math.min(j.w,meta.width||j.w);await input.resize({width,withoutEnlargement:true}).webp({quality:j.q}).toFile(j.out);console.log('optimized',j.in,'->',j.out);} })().catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1);});"
